title: Grilled Australian Lamb Chops with Malty Glaze
description: A sweet and savory dish featuring grilled lamb chops smothered in a malty glaze, perfect for a dinner party.
instructions: Season lamb chops with salt and pepper.
Brush lamb chops with coconut oil and grill for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Meanwhile, combine honey, brown sugar, soy sauce, green onions, and garlic in a small saucepan.
Bring the glaze to a simmer over medium heat and cook, stirring occasionally, until slightly thickened, about 5 minutes.
Brush the glaze over the grilled lamb chops during the last minute of cooking.
Let the lamb chops rest for 5 minutes before serving.
